name: gcli-benchmark-prototype
description: Contributor-facing eval harness for Gemini CLI, built around deterministic tasks, objective verification, and regression reporting

scripts.run: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run
scripts.list: npm run build && node dist/cli.js list
scripts.gaps: npm run build && node dist/cli.js gaps
scripts.compare: npm run build && node dist/cli.js compare
scripts.draft-task: npm run build && node dist/cli.js draft-task
